_comment: Golden fixture: Linear comment item envelope — a comment on a Linear issue.
_authority_boundary: Provider fact only. Not Source, SourceSnapshot, SourceEvidence, DecisionCandidate, Decision, ToolRequest, ExternalIngestEnvelope, or event-store authority.
content: Checked the Postgres docs on advisory locks. Session-level locks seem safer than transaction-level for our long-running poller pattern. Will prototype with pg_advisory_lock(bigint).
